items.title: DISCOVERY-04 Naming
items.summary: Shortlist of 8 names is ready and Nidilo is the top recommendation. Operator naming decision is still pending.

items.title: Brand name decision from Nidilo shortlist (8 candidates)
items.summary: Choose the launch brand name so identity, packaging, and storefront work can settle on one direction.

items.title: Exact in-stock date and sellable units for launch
items.summary: Lock the stock date and launch quantity so spend, conversion guardrails, and stockout risk can be planned correctly.

items.title: Processor compatibility matrix v1
items.summary: Define supported processor families for launch to reduce wrong-buy and return risk.

items.title: Payment stack day-1 confirmation (Italy: cards + PayPal minimum)
items.summary: Confirm the first payment method set so checkout confidence and launch-readiness assumptions are grounded.

items.title: Product photography for site and social creative
items.summary: Arrange launch photography for the top SKU lane so the site and paid/social creative can ship credibly.

items.title: Checkout reliability pack (20 or more end-to-end test orders)
items.summary: Run the checkout reliability pack before launch so payment and fulfilment behavior are not assumed.

items.title: Select brand name from naming shortlist
items.summary: Nidilo is the top recommendation. Choosing the name closes the naming blocker and unlocks identity work.

items.title: Confirm stock date and sellable units
items.summary: Publish the inventory cap rule once the stock date and launch quantity are confirmed.

items.title: Lock compatibility matrix v1
items.summary: Confirm the processor families supported at launch so fit/returns messaging can be finalised.

items.title: Arrange product photography for the top-3 SKU lane
items.summary: Capture images for the multi-pack headband, organiser pouch, and patch pack so the first storefront and creative can ship.

items.title: Confirm day-1 payment method set and run checkout reliability pack
items.summary: Lock the payment method set and complete the reliability pack before launch traffic is sent to the site.

items.title: Scale paid expansion vs hold/fix
items.summary: Do not reopen this decision until the week-2 gate has denominator-valid CVR, CAC, returns, and payment evidence.
